name: api-bdd-example
description: Example Cucumber.js + Axios harness for REST API checks

scripts.test:verbose: cucumber-js --format json:results/latest-run.json >/dev/null && node -e 'const fs=require("fs"); const data=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync("results/latest-run.json","utf8")); for (const f of data){ console.log("Feature: " + f.name); for (const s of (f.elements||[])){ const statuses=(s.steps||[]).map(st=>st.result&&st.result.status).filter(Boolean); const status=statuses.includes("failed")?"FAILED":statuses.includes("pending")?"PENDING":statuses.includes("undefined")?"UNDEFINED":"PASSED"; console.log("  - [" + status + "] " + s.name);} console.log(""); }'
scripts.test:report: mkdir -p results && npm run test:json && npm run report:html
